text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm gathering reference materials
for races in the school library...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait! I wanna read that magazine too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure it's got an article about that race
where Prez stayed in the lead the whole time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Maaan, I wish I could run like Prez...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I don't get going until the final corner...
But you can never have too many tricks up your
sleeve, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!
Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I don't get going until the final corner...
But you can never have too many tricks up your
sleeve, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!
Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You think so too?! Ahaha, we're like two peas in a
pod!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be tough going, but I'm gonna do my
very best to become just like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Tokai Teio runs off like a kid
hyped up on candy. Looks like I managed to
kindle her motivation.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hehe! Well, it is me we're talking about! ♪ I gotta say, you have a good eye!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna polish up the weapons I've
currently got!
